meta.title: Robert Stumborg - Product Engineer
hero.heading:
Robert Stumborg.
I build things that work.
hero.bio.p1: Full stack product engineer. I've spent 15 years building the kind of software other businesses run on; SaaS platforms, mobile apps, ML pipelines, operational tools. I work best when I own the full surface: architecture through deployment.
featured.label: FEATURED
project.eventjetter.title: EventJetter
project.eventjetter.desc.p1: EventJetter is a multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform for event travel agencies. Its centerpiece is event discovery: agents search any destination and instantly see every concert, game, and show happening within their trip dates — powered by a locally-synced catalog with fuzzy search, trending performers, and destination-level browsing. From there, they assemble complete travel packages with aligned hotels and flights.
project.eventjetter.desc.p2: The agent workflow covers itinerary building, client management, package lifecycle tracking (draft → live → archived), and line-item pricing. A standout feature is the automated marketing pipeline: Remotion renders branded video ads in multiple formats and durations, Playwright generates social media banners, and AI-assisted tools produce contextual captions and email copy — all from package data.
project.eventjetter.desc.p3: The core architecture challenge was clean multi-tenancy with three permission tiers (app admin → agency admin → agent). Doctrine query extensions automatically scope all data access by agency and role, so controllers and repositories never handle tenant filtering directly.
project.eventjetter.desc.p4: Integrates with event inventory, hotel, and flight providers, plus AI-assisted tools for marketing copy.
project.shooterbet.title: shooter.bet
project.shooterbet.desc.p1: shooter.bet is a real-time match prediction platform where users wager virtual currency on individual rounds of live CS2 bot matches streamed on Twitch. Each round opens a betting window during freeze time, users pick a side, and payouts settle instantly when the round ends — a parimutuel pool model where winners split the losers' pot proportionally.
project.shooterbet.desc.p2: The core technical challenge was building a reliable real-time pipeline from game to browser. CS2's Game State Integration — configured on the game client, not the server — pushes match data to a Laravel backend webhook, which processes round transitions, manages betting windows, calculates payouts with row-level locking and atomic balance updates, and broadcasts everything to Angular clients through Laravel Reverb WebSockets. A priority-based job queue (Beanstalkd) ensures bet payouts are never delayed by lower-priority work.
project.shooterbet.desc.p3: A Python automation daemon bridges the platform to the physical CS2 server — controlling matches via RCON, managing the game client through xdotool, and orchestrating OBS scene transitions for the Twitch stream. A custom SourceMod plugin fetches player model data from the API to apply user-customized bot appearances in-game. The platform also runs AI-driven bot users with eight distinct betting personalities and context-aware chat, creating organic-feeling activity around the clock.
project.shooterbet.desc.p4: Features include multi-method auth (Discord, Steam, X/Twitter SSO), a 50-level XP/achievement system, map voting with currency-weighted votes, user-to-user money transfers, a referral program, and a custom async IRC client built on AmphPHP for alternative user verification.
project.costdetect.title: CostDetect
project.costdetect.desc.p1: Grocery prices vary significantly across retailers, but comparing them accurately requires solving a hard data normalization problem: every store uses different product naming, categorization, and units. CostDetect solves this with an ML classification layer that identifies and normalizes products on the fly, making cross-store price comparison reliable without manual curation.
project.costdetect.desc.p2: Built the complete system: React Native frontend, Laravel API backend, and a Python/PyTorch pipeline for product categorization. The core engineering challenge wasn't the app, it was building a classifier accurate enough that users could actually trust the output.
project.email.title: Email Campaign Platform
project.email.desc: A multi-tenant email campaign management platform used operationally by affiliate networks, before "SaaS" was the common term for it. Handled contact segmentation, A/B split testing with results tracking, and high-volume delivery via PowerMTA. My first experience building software other businesses depended on operationally, and the origin of my understanding of how technology and marketing intersect at scale.
project.rateprowler.title: rateprowler
project.rateprowler.desc: When running large-scale scraping pipelines against retailer APIs without documented rate limits, buying too few proxies wastes money, too many wastes more. rateprowler probes an API systematically to empirically estimate its rate ceiling, so you can size infrastructure to match reality rather than guesswork. Built from a real operational need during high-volume data collection work.
project.maildir.title: maildir
project.maildir.desc: Tasked with processing a large archive of email content stored in maildir format, I built a PHP library to handle the standard correctly: performant, storage-efficient, and clean enough to open source afterward. Now available for anyone building maildir processing into PHP-based applications.
project.tld.title: tld
project.tld.desc: CLI tool for quickly searching available domains across nearly every TLD and gTLD. Built for people who live in the terminal and want to brainstorm domain names without touching a browser.
project.commentgpt.title: CommentGPT
project.commentgpt.desc: Input a YouTube URL, select a tone, get a contextually relevant comment generated from the video content. A practical experiment with OpenAI's API, built to explore LLM capabilities concretely rather than theoretically.
project.unicode.title: Unicode Browser
project.unicode.desc: Web tool for exploring the Unicode character space: codepoints, names, descriptions, categories, searchable and filterable. Inspired by discovering Private Use Areas in NerdFonts and wanting to understand the full shape of the Unicode standard.
project.postimage.title: POST Image
project.postimage.desc: Browser extension (Chrome + Firefox) for uploading images via right-click context menu. The resulting URL opens in a new tab and/or copies to clipboard based on user preferences. One of those small tools that removes daily friction.
exp.tuio.desc: Core engineer on a small team building a financial SaaS platform for private academic institutions. Primarily focused on the invoicing, transaction, and payment fee subsystems — architecture, refactoring, and ongoing development of the platform's core revenue-generating logic.
exp.tuio.skills.label: Skills
exp.tuio.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.tuio.highlight.1: Restructured the platform's payment architecture to support multiple processors, then built one integration end-to-end and led the team through a second, including merchant boarding, webhooks, and fund distribution
exp.tuio.highlight.2: Refactored the transaction fee calculation engine and built an automated test suite that validates against a QA spreadsheet, achieving comprehensive coverage across billing configurations
exp.tuio.highlight.3: Developed and implemented a credits system for the platform (data model, API, transaction logic, and refund handling) integrated into the existing invoicing and payment pipeline
exp.tuio.highlight.4: Automated multiple internal billing processes, including transaction fee and recovery fee invoicing, replacing manual workflows with scheduled platform features that generate and deliver invoices automatically
exp.tuio.highlight.5: Conducted technical interviews for developer and QA candidates, mentored team members through code reviews, and delivered team presentations on automatic testing and AI workflows
exp.costdetect.desc: Originally engaged through stumb digital as a contract project, then transitioned to a full-time role. Built the complete platform: React Native frontend, Laravel API backend, and a Python/PyTorch ML pipeline for grocery product categorization. Responsible for architecture, implementation, and iteration across the full stack.
exp.costdetect.skills.label: Skills
exp.costdetect.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.costdetect.highlight.1: Built the platform from scratch — React Native mobile app, Laravel API, and a Python/PyTorch ML classification pipeline that normalized product data across retailers with different naming, categorization, and units
exp.costdetect.highlight.2: Designed data visualization layer using d3.js to surface pricing trends and cross-retailer comparisons, turning raw scraped data into actionable insights for users
exp.costdetect.highlight.3: Established data quality validation pipelines to ensure accuracy and completeness of ingested retailer pricing data across heterogeneous sources
exp.stumb.desc: Independent consultancy delivering custom web and mobile software for clients across various industries. Consistent theme: small teams with real operational problems that needed real software solutions, not templates.
exp.stumb.skills.label: Skills
exp.stumb.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.stumb.highlight.1: Engaged CostDetect as a client, building the initial platform architecture that grew into a full-time product role
exp.stumb.highlight.2: Managed full project lifecycles from client consultation and requirements gathering through deployment and ongoing maintenance across multiple concurrent engagements
exp.responsive.desc: Worked across product, development, and design for a distribution company running high-traffic DTC ecommerce operations. Built and maintained the web platforms driving daily sales, while managing product direction, affiliate partnerships, and campaign performance.
exp.responsive.skills.label: Skills
exp.responsive.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.responsive.highlight.1: Helped scale a DTC consumer brand to $25k/day in revenue, managing product, affiliate partnerships, campaign performance, and margins across the full operation
exp.responsive.highlight.2: Built and maintained high-traffic ecommerce storefronts with shopping cart, payment processing, and product search functionality on UltraCart
exp.responsive.highlight.3: Designed marketing assets and product creatives in Illustrator, working across the full funnel from ad creative to landing page to checkout
exp.stumborg.desc: Freelance development for clients alongside running independent affiliate marketing operations. Applied the platform-building and high-volume email experience from Intermark Media to my own campaigns while delivering custom software for external clients.
exp.stumborg.skills.label: Skills
exp.stumborg.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.stumborg.highlight.1: Built a dynamic quiz and landing page generator for ringtone campaigns, producing artist-specific funnels at scale for a client
exp.stumborg.highlight.2: Ran independent affiliate marketing campaigns at scale, applying platform-building and high-volume email experience to generate revenue across multiple verticals
exp.intermark.desc: First full-time role, at an affiliate marketing company. Built internal platforms that the business ran on daily, including tools for cross-network data exchange and email campaign operations.
exp.intermark.skills.label: Skills
exp.intermark.highlights.label: Highlights
exp.intermark.highlight.1: Built a multi-tenant data exchange platform used by marketing companies to share and route lead data between networks -- effectively a B2B SaaS product before the term was mainstream
exp.intermark.highlight.2: Developed an internal platform for creating, managing, and sending email campaigns at scale using PowerMTA for high-volume delivery, used as core operational tooling across the business
exp.intermark.highlight.3: Collaborated with marketing and business development teams to translate campaign requirements into technical solutions, optimizing email deliverability and building reporting dashboards for performance tracking
contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.desc: I'm currently open to new roles and select consulting projects. If you're building something interesting, especially in fintech, edtech, or anything at the intersection of the two, I'd like to hear about it.
